source.title: Data Therapist supplementary materials
source.immutability_boundary: The OSF node is mutable and unregistered. Every inspected file was version 1 at acquisition; local SHA-256 hashes, OSF file IDs, and creation/modification timestamps preserve the inspected state. The December 2025 README and visualization-designer PDF postdate immutable arXiv v3 (updated 2025-10-04) and are not treated as paper-time evidence.

files.name: data-therapist-chi2025.zip
files.contents: Three study datasets, three merged participant-response/coding CSVs, and one prompt/pseudocode text file; extracted under materials/.

files.name: Evaluation of annotations with visualization designers..pdf
files.timing_note: Post-v3 supplemental artifact; not evidence available in the immutable paper.

not_archived: Data Therapist CHI2025.mp4 (7,272,777 bytes; OSF SHA-256 16326aec4bff24e42e34bbacc959c6942aa65476a7ee17dfb989a1ae6708d355) because the retained captions and paper fully expose the inspectable claims needed for this review
release_limits: No application source code, dependency lock, deployable server, study protocol, consent form, participant instructions, session recordings/transcripts, event logs, raw question-priority records, analysis code, or model-call records were present.
The released prompt file is prompt prose and pseudocode, not the implementation called 'codes' in the README.
The three response CSV schemas are inconsistent and do not contain the paper's item-level difficulty ratings despite the README saying participant scores are included.
No explicit license file was present in the inspected OSF materials.
